Azmat Mungur

Engineer by trade. Hacker by habit.

I'm moving deeper into AI-augmented engineering ŌĆö using agents and agentic workflows the way I use anything: find the leverage point, bend it past its design, make it do something useful that nobody thought to document.

Experience Field Notes

Certifications

Formal recognition of the depth built across cloud and infrastructure platforms.

Performance meets AI engineering

I've spent the better part of a decade making systems measurable ŌĆö profiling, tracing, and eliminating latency before it compounds. Now I'm applying that same discipline to AI: building agents and agentic workflows that extend what engineering teams can do, not replace the craft underneath.

Measure first

I don't guess. I instrument, profile, and trace before touching the code.

AI as amplifier

Agents and workflows that extend engineering capacity, not replace the discipline underneath it.

Ship with confidence

Every change lands with visibility. Observability isn't a feature ŌĆö it's the foundation.

Own the incident

When systems fail, I dig in. Root cause over band-aids ŌĆö then make it structurally impossible to repeat.
